penalties.description: Task appears incomplete - final suture cutting phase and slit closure assessment cannot be confirmed from the visible frames.

reasoning: The video shows intracorporeal suturing with visible knot tying phases, but the task appears incomplete as the final suture cutting and definitive slit closure are not clearly shown. Multiple throws are visible but hand exchanges between throws cannot be definitively confirmed from this camera angle. The Penrose drain remains attached throughout the visible portion. Due to apparent incompletion, the score is set to zero.
